latin: Telephono auxilium petivi. 'vox tua nobis magni momenti est,' machina dixit. deinde musica horrenda per duas horas cecinit. cum tandem homo verus respondit, conexio interrupta est.

questions.prompt: What did the automated message say?
questions.target: Your call is very important to us
choices: Your call is very important to us

questions.prompt: What happened when a real person finally answered?
choices: They put the caller back on hold

translation: I called for help by phone. 'Your voice is very important to us,' the machine said. Then horrible music played for two hours. When a real person finally answered, the connection was cut off.
